title: EvalForge — Multi-Dimensional AI Eval Harness
description: Standalone harness that scores any LLM/agent on RAG groundedness, tool-use reliability, and guardrail robustness — with versioned YAML suites, a CI regression gate, and a live dashboard.
detailedDescription: EvalForge runs versioned test suites from git against any LLM or agent endpoint and scores three dimensions: RAG groundedness (LLM/heuristic judge + citation F1), agentic tool-use (selection accuracy + argument F1), and guardrail robustness (block-rate + false-refusal-rate). Results persist to Postgres, export to Prometheus/Grafana, and feed a CI gate that fails on threshold breaches or metric regression. Pluggable adapters support mock (offline) or OpenAI-compatible targets; includes JUnit XML for GitHub Actions and a showcase dashboard deployed on Render.
features: Versioned YAML test suites in git
CI gate with floors, ceilings, and regression checks
Live dashboard with per-case drill-down and trends
Postgres history, Prometheus metrics, GitHub Actions

title: RadiTriage — AI Radiology Workflow Assistant
description: Agentic veterinary radiology pipeline: classify urgency → RAG over prior cases → draft a preliminary report → route to a specialist queue. Role-based access, SLA ops dashboard, and key-safe Claude proxy with demo fallback.
detailedDescription: Agentic veterinary radiology pipeline: classify urgency → RAG over prior cases → draft a preliminary report → route to a specialist queue. Role-based access (Vet/Radiologist/Admin), an SLA ops dashboard, and a key-safe Node proxy to Claude — with an always-works demo fallback.
features: Agentic triage pipeline with live execution log
RAG addendum Q&A over generated reports

title: Agentic AI Governance Harness
description: Reproducible benchmark harness for agentic AI governance — measures guardrail trip rate, policy latency, intervention frequency, and cost per resolved task.
detailedDescription: A reproducible benchmark harness for agentic AI governance that measures guardrail trip rate, policy latency, intervention frequency, and cost per resolved task. Includes a live interactive demo for exploring policy outcomes and comparing model behavior under governance constraints.

title: Nexus SRE — Cloud Cost & Reliability Agent
description: Autonomous FinOps + SRE agent: Bedrock reasoning over CloudWatch, Cost Explorer, and Trusted Advisor — with human-in-the-loop approval before any write remediation.
detailedDescription: Autonomous FinOps + SRE agent: Bedrock reasoning over CloudWatch, Cost Explorer, and Trusted Advisor — with human-in-the-loop approval before any write remediation. Live command-center UI on Render.
features: CloudWatch + Cost Explorer + Trusted Advisor integrations
Human-in-the-loop approval gate for write actions

title: FieldTech Assistant
description: RAG-powered assistant for field technicians with manuals, wiring context, service history, and offline-first PWA.
detailedDescription: RAG-powered assistant for field technicians: manuals, wiring context, service history, QR asset lookup, and offline-first PWA. Built with FastAPI and React on Docker for deployable, production-style field workflows.
features: RAG over manuals and service history

title: ML Experiment Tracker MCP
description: MCP server for experiment runs, metrics, hyperparameters, and tags with SQLite persistence and a live dashboard.
detailedDescription: MCP server for experiment runs, metrics, hyperparameters, and tags with SQLite persistence—plus a live dashboard to browse and compare runs. Designed for agent workflows that need structured experiment history.

title: AWS CloudOps MCP
description: Read-focused MCP server for AWS ops with a live dashboard and synthetic inventory for demos.
detailedDescription: Read-focused MCP server for AWS ops (EC2, CloudWatch, ELB, Lambda, S3) via boto3—plus a live dashboard with synthetic inventory for demos. Useful for agent-driven cloud inspection and operational visibility.
features: EC2, CloudWatch, ELB, Lambda, S3 tools

title: Small Business Operations MCP
description: MCP server for tasks, expenses, CRM, and inventory with finance CSV analytics and a live ops dashboard.
detailedDescription: MCP server for tasks, expenses, CRM, and inventory with finance CSV analytics (margins, payroll, anomalies) plus a live ops dashboard on Render. Built for small-business operational workflows exposed to agents.
features: Tasks, expenses, CRM, and inventory tools

title: Budget Insights Platform
description: Cloud-first finance platform with Flask microservices, React dashboard, and anomaly detection.
detailedDescription: Cloud-first finance platform: Flask transaction + analytics microservices, React dashboard, anomaly detection, and budget insights—live demo on Render. Demonstrates production-style service boundaries and analytics UX.

title: Geofences Platform
description: Geofencing platform with Apple-inspired UI, real-time notifications, and policy automation.
detailedDescription: Geofencing platform with Apple-inspired UI: create and monitor geofences, real-time notifications, track processing, and policy automation. Focused on clean product UX around location-based workflows.

title: pgvector RAG Demo
description: RAG chat app with PostgreSQL pgvector retrieval, embeddings, and Streamlit UI with citations.
detailedDescription: RAG chat app: PostgreSQL pgvector retrieval, sentence-transformers embeddings, and Streamlit UI with source citations. Demonstrates vector search and grounded answers in a compact deployable demo.
